task_completion.description: Verify that the track.png texture has been applied to the RectangleArena floor appearance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree (left panel), expand 'RectangleArena' -> 'floorAppearance' -> 'ImageTexture'. The 'url' field should be set to the path ending in 'track.png'. Alternatively, the main 3D view should clearly show an oval line track painted on the floor.

task_completion.description: Verify that the EPUCK robot has E-puckGroundSensors equipped in its groundSensorsSlot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, expand the 'EPUCK' node. The 'groundSensorsSlot' field should contain the 'E-puckGroundSensors' node.

task_completion.description: Verify that the EPUCK robot's controller is set to 'e-puck_line'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, under the 'EPUCK' node, the 'controller' field should be explicitly set to 'e-puck_line'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the EPUCK robot is positioned at the correct translation and rotation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree, under the 'EPUCK' node, the 'translation' field should be set to '0.36 0.36 0' and the 'rotation' field should be set to '0 0 1 -1.5708'. The robot should visibly sit on the track line in the 3D view.

task_completion.description: Verify that the configured world has been saved to the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots window title bar should display 'epuck_line_follow.wbt', or a file manager/terminal should show the file 'epuck_line_follow.wbt' existing on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Webots application GUI to configure the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Webots interface open with the scene tree being actively manipulated, rather than a text editor modifying the .wbt file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the Webots interface to save the world.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Webots 'Save World As...' dialog should be visible in the trajectory, or the Webots title bar should update to reflect the new file name.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the simulation software by writing a script to generate the .wbt file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of the Webots 3D view and scene tree interactions in the trajectory, confirming manual or GUI-driven configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output file must be saved to '/home/ga/Desktop/epuck_line_follow.wbt'. The track texture must be 'track.png'. The robot is named 'EPUCK'. The controller must be 'e-puck_line'. The expected translation is x=0.36, y=0.36 (acceptable range is 0.15 to 0.50 for both X and Y).
